title: Section 29A
content: 1[29A. power to delegate.--The Central Government may, by order published in the Official Gazette, direct that the powers (except the power under section 30) exercisable by it under any provision of this Act shall, in relation to such matters and subject to such conditions, if any, as may be specified in the order, be exercisable also by the Securities and Exchange Board of India or the Reserve Bank of India constituted under section 3 of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 (2 of 1934).]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 31 of 1999, s. 9, for section 29A (w.e.f. 22-2-2000).
